provider: Banff Centre for Arts and Creativity
title: Artist Residencies
description: Artist Residencies is a project-based professional or artist residency administered by Banff Centre for Arts and Creativity.
eligibility: Applicants must meet the current career-stage, affiliation, location, availability, work-authorization, and application requirements.
value: Dedicated project time, facilities, mentoring, public presentation, or program-specific funding
